'''dhajïfhïf''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:kybp|kybp]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''inanimate''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-j-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:kybp|kybp]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| inanimate
|-
! Citation form
| dhajïfhïf
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || dhæjïfhïfth || dhæjïfhïfj || dhæjïfhïfsh || dhæjïfhïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || dhajïfjïfhïfth || dhajïfjïfhïfj || dhajïfjïfhïfsh || dhajïfjïfhïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || dhajïfhïfth || dhajïfhïfj || dhajïfhïfsh || dhajïfhïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || dhajïffhïffth || dhajïffhïffj || dhajïffhïffsh || dhajïffhïff
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for inanimate singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || dhajïfhïfïf || dhajïfhïfïf || dhajïfhïfïf || dhajïfhïfïf
|-
| [[Patient]] || dhajïfhïfth || dhajïfhïfj || dhajïfhïfsh || dhajïfhïf
|-
| [[Possessive]] || dhajïfhïfïfl || dhajïfhïfïfl || dhajïfhïfïfl || dhajïfhïfïfl
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || dhajïfhïfïfïf || dhajïfhïfïfïf || dhajïfhïfïfïf || dhajïfhïfïfïf
|-
| [[Dative]] || dhajïfhïfïfn || dhajïfhïfïfn || dhajïfhïfïfn || dhajïfhïfïfn
|-
| [[Speaker]] || dhajïfhïfïforo || dhajïfhïfïforo || dhajïfhïfïforo || dhajïfhïfïforo
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki inanimate nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words a3ddb2a]]
[[Category:Words 5bad82d]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|b480631}}
